mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.fact_shipments ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, order_id, order_number, customer_id, customer_name, carrier, tracking_number, shipping_method, state_id, flow_id, delivery_attempts, estimated_delivery_date, actual_delivery_date, current_location, from_address, to_address, destination_pincode, weight, dimensions, delivery_instructions, shipped_at, created_time ) SELECT sh.id, sh.tenant, NOW(), sh.order_id, COALESCE(o.order_number, ''), sh.customer_id, COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || COALESCE(u.last_name, ''), ''), sh.carrier, sh.tracking_number, sh.shipping_method, sh.state_id, sh.flow_id, COALESCE(sh.delivery_attempts, 0), sh.estimated_delivery_date, sh.actual_delivery_date, sh.current_location, sh.from_address, sh.to_address, COALESCE(sh.destination_pincode, ''), sh.weight, sh.dimensions, sh.delivery_instructions, sh.shipped_at, sh.created_time FROM hm_shipping.shipments sh LEFT JOIN hm_order.orders o ON sh.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN hm_user.user_profiles u ON sh.customer_id = u.id
mapper.update: INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_carrier (carrier_code, carrier_name, last_synced_at) SELECT DISTINCT sh.carrier, COALESCE(sh.carrier, ''), NOW() FROM hm_shipping.shipments sh WHERE sh.carrier IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT (carrier_code) DO UPDATE SET carrier_name = EXCLUDED.carrier_name, last_synced_at = EXCLUDED.last_synced_at

INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_geography (pincode, city, state, country, last_synced_at) SELECT DISTINCT a.postal_code, COALESCE(a.city, ''), COALESCE(a.state, ''), COALESCE(a.country, 'IN'), NOW() FROM hm_order.order_addresses a WHERE a.address_type = 'SHIPPING' AND a.postal_code IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT (pincode) DO UPDATE SET city = EXCLUDED.city, state = EXCLUDED.state, country = EXCLUDED.country, last_synced_at = EXCLUDED.last_synced_at
